Designed to run in the background, Quick connects seamlessly with local files, emails, calendars, and various workplace tools such as Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, Zoom, and Salesforce to gather context and streamline tasks. It can draft communications, create documents and presentations, analyze data, and automate routine workflows, even in browser-based environments or developer tools like Kiro CLI and Claude Code.\\n\\nQuick stands out for its proactive capabilities, monitoring user activity across applications and highlighting relevant tasks, rather than waiting for prompts. It also incorporates personalization by developing a unique knowledge graph for each user, capturing preferences, team dynamics, and organizational context based on granted data access.
